description_long: This is a striking double-neck electric guitar with a bold blue body and two elongated necks, each fitted with its own set of tuning pegs. The front features two sets of pickups, control knobs, and switches, all arranged symmetrically for each neck, with metallic hardware and a white pickguard accentuating the design. The body has a classic, contoured shape reminiscent of iconic rock guitars, with a smooth, glossy finish that reflects light. The back is mostly solid blue with a small lighter blue patch, and the necks are seamlessly integrated into the body. The headstocks are both blue, each with six tuning pegs arranged in a straight line, and no visible brand logo. This guitar is designed for versatility and stage presence, making it suitable for performances in urban parks, street corners, or music venues.
description: A bold blue double-neck electric guitar with two sets of pickups, control knobs, and a glossy finish, designed for versatile musical performance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid blue back, dual necks, and two blue headstocks with white tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slim, contoured body and the thickness of the guitar, with visible hardware protrusions.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the dual necks, two sets of pickups, control knobs, switches, and a white pickguard on a blue body.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness and hardware details along the edge.
attribute_headstock_design: Two blue headstocks, each with six inline white tuning pegs, no visible logo, simple rectangular shape
